selectionReason: Doctor corrected D2 is the strongest second-service target because V2-F already proved artifact-level reducer savings on its dependency surface and historical corrected D2 runtime acceptance exists.

fallbacksConsidered.reason: Would require creating a fresh optimized target artifact before testing reducer generalization.
Useful as launch-mode diagnostic, but not second-service generalization.

rules: Use only the existing V2-E LVT/LVTT reducer.
